title: Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited!
